title: Gunray On Top
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|italics=1}}

|image=

|release date=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|life/13314_3.html|Valorum & Gunray Bracket Ends of Book Sales}} is set on the date 13:3:14. As the article establishes that the publication of ''Gunray on Top'' was two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition's]] report on the novel, the work must have been released in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>
|media type=[[Book/Legends|Book]]<ref name="HNN" />

|published in=
|genre=Biography<ref name="HNN" />
}}
'''''Gunray On Top''''' was an unauthorized biography of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] that was published by [[TriPlanetary Press/Legends|TriPlanetary Press]]<ref name="HNN" /> in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> The [[Book/Legends|book]] was written by Gunray's alleged mistress, [[Lora Besh]], as a provocative tell-all on the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy's]] life<ref name="HNN" /> in the aftermath of his numerous trials in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Supreme Court/Legends|Supreme Court]] following his failed [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="Ep II">{{Film|II}}</ref> in [[32 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

The book was released on the same date as another TriPlanetary Press product, former [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum's]] autobiography, ''[[Holding Back the Tide]]''. While Valorum's book floundered, ''Gunray On Top'' was met with wild enthusiasm and spent at least fourteen [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] on the top-ten bestseller list. The impressive disparity in popularity between the two works was reported on in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the book's release date.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Gunray on Top'' was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}</ref> The site's content was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
